summary: Completed testing of Kinetix PWA - Backend fully functional, critical frontend routing and state management issues found

ui_bugs.issue: Find Route button not appearing when both origin and destination are selected
Selected location values not persisting in input fields - inputs revert to placeholders after selection

integration_issues.issue: Bottom navigation buttons for Tickets and Settings pages not switching pages - stays on map-page
Cannot test route finding due to Find Route button not appearing

passed_tests: Backend API /api/radar/live returns live crowding data
Backend API /api/routes/find returns proper route options
Map page loads with Leaflet map centered on Baku
Floating search bar visible with origin and destination inputs
Transport mode toggle pills present and clickable
Search autocomplete shows correct Baku locations (Icherisheher, Sahil)
AI Radar page loads with dark map and station list
AI Radar page filters and refresh functionality work
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical frontend React state management issues: 1) Page navigation routing not working for Tickets/Settings pages, 2) FloatingSearchBar state not updating when locations selected - inputs revert to placeholders, 3) Find Route button logic broken - not appearing when both locations selected. Backend APIs are fully functional.
